name: @gana-v8/hermes-dispatcher
description: Persisted dispatcher runtime for Hermes automation cycles.

scripts.test: pnpm run build && tsx --tsconfig ../../tsconfig.base.json --eval "import('./src/index.ts').then((module) => { if (module.workspaceInfo?.packageName !== '@gana-v8/hermes-dispatcher') throw new Error('workspaceInfo.packageName mismatch'); if (!Array.isArray(module.workspaceInfo?.dependencies)) throw new Error('workspaceInfo.dependencies should be an array'); console.log('test ok: @gana-v8/hermes-dispatcher'); })"
scripts.clean: node --eval "import('node:fs/promises').then(fs => fs.rm('dist', { recursive: true, force: true }))"
